pros: Earn guaranteed rewards (Kiwis) on every UPI payment made via RuPay credit cards.
Seamless virtual credit card issuance through Axis Bank with lifetime free benefits.
Instant 1-click redemption of reward points directly into your linked bank account.
Sleek, user-friendly interface optimized for fast checkout experiences.
cons: Maximum rewards are tied to RuPay Credit Card UPI transactions rather than standard bank-to-bank UPI.
Credit card approval is subject to credit score and bank eligibility criteria.
detailed_review:
Unlocking the Power of UPI on Credit Card with Kiwi

Kiwi is a revolutionary fintech platform in India that bridges the gap between credit card rewards and the convenience of UPI payments. By partnering with leading financial institutions like Axis Bank, Kiwi offers a virtual RuPay credit card that allows users to scan any UPI QR code and pay using credit. This unique ecosystem ensures that you earn rewards on daily micro-transactions, something traditional credit cards rarely offer.

Why Millions of Users are Switching to Kiwi

The primary appeal of Kiwi lies in its unmatched rewards structure. Unlike traditional apps where UPI payments yield nothing but digital scratch cards with 'better luck next time,' Kiwi guarantees reward points (known as Kiwis) for your spending. Since RuPay cards are natively supported on the UPI network, you can use your Kiwi credit line at local grocery stores, tea stalls, or high-end retail outlets alike.

  • Lifetime Free Card: The co-branded Axis Bank RuPay card has no joining or annual fees.
  • Direct Cashback: Earned rewards can be converted to real cash and deposited directly into your bank account instantly.
  • Credit Score Improvement: Regular, disciplined use of the Kiwi credit line helps build and improve your credit history.

How to Maximize Your Sign-up Bonus and Rewards

To kickstart your journey, Kiwi is running a limited-time promotional campaign. By signing up with the referral code EV6F66, new users instantly unlock a ₹100 cash reward. To maximize your ongoing earnings, ensure you set Kiwi as your primary UPI app for merchant payments and systematically route your monthly expenses through the virtual RuPay card to accumulate substantial cashback.
steps: Download the Kiwi app from the official Google Play Store or Apple App Store.
Sign up by verifying your mobile number (ensure it is the one linked to your bank accounts).
During the setup process, look for the referral/promo code section and enter the code EV6F66.
Complete your basic profile details and apply for the lifetime-free Axis Bank Kiwi RuPay Credit Card.
Once approved or after linking your UPI/RuPay card, make your first UPI payment of any amount.
Your ₹100 sign-up bonus will be credited to your rewards section, which you can instantly redeem to your bank account.

faq.question: How do I claim the ₹100 sign-up reward on Kiwi?
faq.answer: To claim your ₹100 reward, download the Kiwi app, enter the referral code EV6F66 during registration, and complete your first UPI transaction.

faq.question: What are Kiwi rewards and how do I redeem them?
faq.answer: Kiwi rewards are points earned on UPI transactions. You can redeem these points directly from the app's rewards dashboard as real cash sent to your linked bank account.

faq.question: Are there any annual fees for the Kiwi Axis Bank Credit Card?
faq.answer: No, the co-branded Kiwi Axis Bank RuPay Credit Card issued through the app is lifetime free, meaning there are zero joining fees and zero annual maintenance charges.

faq.question: Can I use Kiwi if I don't get approved for the credit card?
faq.answer: Yes, you can still link your existing bank accounts or other RuPay credit cards to Kiwi and use it as a standard UPI payment app while enjoying regular app features.
